title: Team agents planning roster reset
acceptance: The task index lists `TASK-TEAM-0001` through `TASK-TEAM-0016` in milestone order.
The plan states that task-card order follows milestones instead of old card numbers.
Old `TASK-TEAM-0001` to `TASK-TEAM-0004` draft meanings are no longer present.
All replacement task cards include `scopePaths`, `deliverables`, `validators`, `evidence`, `rollback`, and `atomizationImpact`.
No framework source files are changed by this planning-only task.
nonGoals: Do not implement Team Agents runtime
Do not change ATM CLI behavior
rollbackNotes: Revert the planning docs commit that resets the Team Agents roster.

importDiagnostics.message: Front-matter `deliverables` key is present; body section deliverables were ignored in favour of front-matter values.

notes: This card exists to make the Team Agents lane clean enough for later agents to import and claim without guessing which draft was current.
